headline: Invesco (IVZ) Expands BulletShares Treasury ETFs For More Precise Bond Ladders
summary: Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) has expanded its BulletShares Treasury Bond ETF suite, adding a broader range of defined maturity U.S. Treasury funds. The company has also introduced new investment grade and high yield corporate bond maturities within the BulletShares lineup. The refreshed range is designed for investors looking for bond laddering, more precise portfolio construction, and risk management in fixed income. Invesco is putting more focus on fixed income ETFs at a time when many investors...
